source_rationale: IL2RA (CD25) is upregulated upon T cell activation and is a classical marker of T cell activation
CD69 is an early activation marker rapidly expressed on T cells following stimulation
IL2RA encodes the high-affinity IL-2 receptor alpha chain induced upon T cell activation
ICOS is a costimulatory molecule upregulated on activated T cells
MHC class II molecules can be expressed on activated human T cells
OX40 (TNFRSF4) is an activation-induced costimulatory receptor on T cells
CD3D is a core component of the T cell receptor complex identifying T cell lineage
MKI67 marks proliferating cells and is expressed in actively dividing activated T cells
GAD1 encodes glutamic acid decarboxylase, expressed in GABAergic amacrine cells of the retina
GAD2 is another glutamic acid decarboxylase isoform marking GABAergic amacrine interneurons
SLC6A9 (glycine transporter) is expressed in glycinergic amacrine cells
TFAP2A is a transcription factor essential for amacrine cell specification in the retina
TFAP2B is a transcription factor involved in amacrine cell differentiation
PAX6 is expressed in amacrine and ganglion cells in the inner nuclear layer of the retina
SLC32A1 (VGAT) is a vesicular inhibitory amino acid transporter expressed in amacrine cells
Calbindin is expressed in specific subtypes of amacrine cells in the retina
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on all vascular endothelial cells
VE-cadherin (CDH5) is an endothelial-specific junctional protein
Von Willebrand factor is produced by endothelial cells and is a classical endothelial marker
PLVAP marks fenestrated endothelium, characteristic of the choriocapillaris
ACKR1 (DARC) is expressed in venular and capillary endothelial cells including choroidal vasculature
RGCC is expressed in choroidal capillary endothelial cells
Carbonic anhydrase 4 is enriched in choriocapillaris endothelial cells
Aquaporin 1 is expressed in the ciliary body epithelium involved in aqueous humor production
Transthyretin is secreted by ciliary body epithelial cells into the aqueous humor
SLC4A4 is a bicarbonate transporter expressed in ciliary body epithelium for aqueous humor secretion
Carbonic anhydrase 2 is highly expressed in ciliary body epithelium for aqueous humor production
PAX6 is expressed in the ciliary body as part of the anterior eye segment
CPAMD8 is expressed in the ciliary body and is associated with anterior segment development
BMP4 is expressed in the ciliary body and plays a role in anterior eye segment signaling
PECAM1 (CD31) is a pan-endothelial marker expressed on ciliary body vasculature
VE-cadherin is an endothelial-specific adhesion molecule
Von Willebrand factor is a classical marker of endothelial cells
VEGFR1 (FLT1) is expressed on vascular endothelial cells
VEGFR2 (KDR) is a key endothelial receptor for VEGF signaling
PLVAP is expressed in fenestrated endothelium found in the ciliary body vasculature
COL9A1 is the defining highly expressed gene for this ciliary body cell subtype
COL9A2 is often co-expressed with COL9A1 as part of type IX collagen
COL9A3 is the third chain of type IX collagen, likely co-expressed in this subtype
AQP1 is a general ciliary body epithelial marker for aqueous humor production
TTR is expressed in ciliary body epithelium and secreted into aqueous humor
Carbonic anhydrase 2 is expressed in ciliary body epithelial cells
OPN1SW encodes short-wave-sensitive cone opsin, specific to S-cone photoreceptors
OPN1MW encodes medium-wave-sensitive cone opsin, specific to M-cone photoreceptors
OPN1LW encodes long-wave-sensitive cone opsin, specific to L-cone photoreceptors
Cone arrestin (ARR3) is specifically expressed in cone photoreceptors
GNAT2 encodes cone transducin alpha subunit, essential for cone phototransduction
PDE6C is the cone-specific phosphodiesterase catalytic subunit
PDE6H is the cone-specific phosphodiesterase inhibitory subunit
GNGT2 encodes cone transducin gamma subunit specific to cone photoreceptors
CNGA3 is the cone-specific cyclic nucleotide-gated channel alpha subunit
CNGB3 is the cone-specific cyclic nucleotide-gated channel beta subunit
KRT13 is a cytokeratin expressed in non-keratinized stratified epithelia including conjunctiva
KRT19 is expressed in conjunctival epithelial cells
MUC5AC is a secreted mucin produced by conjunctival goblet cells
MUC4 is a membrane-associated mucin expressed on conjunctival epithelial cells
KRT7 is expressed in conjunctival epithelium distinguishing it from corneal epithelium
AQP5 is expressed in conjunctival epithelial cells
S100A9 is expressed in conjunctival epithelial cells as part of innate defense
Keratocan is a keratan sulfate proteoglycan specifically expressed by corneal keratocytes/fibroblasts
Lumican is a proteoglycan highly expressed in corneal stroma by keratocytes
Decorin is a proteoglycan abundantly expressed by corneal fibroblasts/keratocytes
ALDH3A1 is a corneal crystallin highly expressed in corneal keratocytes
Type I collagen is the major structural collagen produced by corneal fibroblasts
Type V collagen is enriched in corneal stroma and produced by keratocytes
TGFBI (keratoepithelin) is highly expressed in corneal tissue by stromal fibroblasts
Vimentin is a mesenchymal intermediate filament expressed in corneal fibroblasts
CRYAA (alpha-crystallin A) is the defining highly expressed gene for this ciliary body cell subtype
CRYAB (alpha-crystallin B) is often co-expressed with CRYAA as a molecular chaperone
Beta-crystallin B2 may be co-expressed in crystallin-high ciliary body cells
AQP1 is a general ciliary body epithelial marker
TTR is expressed in ciliary body epithelium
Carbonic anhydrase 2 is expressed in ciliary body epithelial cells
CD8A is the defining surface marker of cytotoxic T lymphocytes
CD8B pairs with CD8A to form the CD8 co-receptor on cytotoxic T cells
Granzyme B is a serine protease in cytotoxic granules used for target cell killing
Granzyme A is a cytotoxic granule protease expressed in cytotoxic T cells
Perforin forms pores in target cell membranes and is essential for cytotoxic function
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes and involved in granule exocytosis
Granulysin is an antimicrobial protein in cytotoxic granules of CTLs
CD3D is part of the TCR complex confirming T cell lineage
Interferon gamma is a key effector cytokine produced by cytotoxic T cells

ELF3 is the defining transcription factor highly expressed in this corneal epithelial subtype

PAX6 is a master regulator of corneal epithelial identity
ALDH3A1 is a corneal crystallin highly expressed in corneal epithelium
Type I collagen alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene produced by fibroblasts
Type I collagen alpha 2 is abundantly expressed by fibroblasts
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed by fibroblasts
Lumican is a proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts in connective tissues

THY1 (CD90) is a surface glycoprotein commonly expressed on fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a receptor tyrosine kinase expressed on fibroblasts
Type III collagen is produced by fibroblasts in connective tissues
Fibronectin is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
ONECUT1 is a transcription factor required for horizontal cell development in the retina
ONECUT2 is a transcription factor involved in horizontal cell specification
LHX1 is a LIM homeodomain transcription factor expressed in horizontal cells

NTRK1 (TrkA) is expressed in horizontal cells of the human retina
PROX1 is a transcription factor expressed in horizontal cells and bipolar cells
GAD1 is expressed in horizontal cells which use GABA as a neurotransmitter
MEG3 is the defining highly expressed long non-coding RNA for this fibroblast subtype
COL1A1 is a canonical fibroblast marker for extracellular matrix production
Decorin is a proteoglycan expressed by fibroblasts
Vimentin is a mesenchymal marker expressed in fibroblasts
Type III collagen is produced by fibroblasts
DLK1 is located in the same imprinted locus as MEG3 and may be co-regulated
MLANA (Melan-A) is a melanocyte-specific protein involved in melanosome biogenesis
PMEL (gp100) is a melanosomal protein essential for melanin deposition
Tyrosinase is the rate-limiting enzyme in melanin biosynthesis
TYRP1 is a melanogenic enzyme involved in melanin synthesis
DCT (dopachrome tautomerase/TYRP2) is involved in melanin biosynthesis
MITF is the master transcription factor for melanocyte development and survival
SOX10 is a transcription factor essential for melanocyte lineage specification
KIT (c-Kit) is a receptor tyrosine kinase critical for melanocyte development
MGP (matrix Gla protein) is the defining highly expressed gene for this fibroblast subtype
COL1A1 is a canonical fibroblast marker
Decorin is a proteoglycan expressed by fibroblasts
Vimentin is a mesenchymal intermediate filament in fibroblasts
Lumican is a proteoglycan produced by fibroblasts
Type I collagen alpha 2 is expressed by fibroblasts
CX3CR1 is a fractalkine receptor highly expressed on microglia
P2RY12 is a purinergic receptor that is a homeostatic microglia-specific marker

C1QA is a complement component highly expressed by microglia

TREM2 is an innate immune receptor expressed on microglia
CD68 is a lysosomal glycoprotein expressed in microglia and macrophages
CD14 is a classical monocyte marker and LPS co-receptor
FCGR3A (CD16) marks non-classical monocytes
S100A8 is highly expressed in classical monocytes as part of the calprotectin complex
S100A9 is highly expressed in classical monocytes
Lysozyme is highly expressed in monocytes and macrophages
Versican is expressed in monocytes and is a marker of classical monocytes
Cystatin C is expressed in monocytes and dendritic cells
Ficolin 1 is highly expressed in classical monocytes
RLBP1 (CRALBP) is a retinaldehyde-binding protein highly expressed in Müller glia
Glutamine synthetase (GLUL) is a canonical Müller glia marker for glutamate recycling
Vimentin is an intermediate filament highly expressed in Müller glial cells
SLC1A3 (GLAST) is a glutamate transporter expressed in Müller glia
Aquaporin 4 is a water channel expressed in Müller glial cell endfeet
Clusterin is highly expressed in Müller glial cells
SOX9 is a transcription factor expressed in Müller glia in the mature retina
HES1 is a Notch target gene expressed in Müller glia maintaining their identity
APOE is highly expressed in Müller glial cells in the retina
GRIK1 (GluK1) is a kainate receptor subunit expressed in OFF bipolar cells
VSX1 is a transcription factor expressed in OFF bipolar cell subtypes
GRIA1 (GluA1) is an ionotropic glutamate receptor expressed in OFF bipolar cells
VSX2 (CHX10) is a transcription factor expressed in bipolar cells
OTX2 is a transcription factor expressed in bipolar cells and photoreceptors
CABP5 is a calcium-binding protein expressed in bipolar cells
GRM6 (mGluR6) is the metabotropic glutamate receptor specific to ON bipolar cells
TRPM1 is a cation channel essential for ON bipolar cell signal transduction
ISL1 is a transcription factor expressed in ON bipolar cells
VSX2 (CHX10) is a transcription factor expressed in bipolar cells
OTX2 is a transcription factor expressed in bipolar cells
GNB3 is a G-protein beta subunit expressed in ON bipolar cells
CABP5 is a calcium-binding protein expressed in bipolar cells
Nyctalopin (NYX) is expressed in ON bipolar cells and is required for signaling
PMEL is a melanosomal protein expressed in pigmented epithelial cells

TYRP1 is a melanogenic enzyme in pigmented ciliary body epithelium
DCT is involved in melanin biosynthesis in pigmented epithelial cells
MITF is a master regulator of melanogenesis in pigmented cells
MLANA is expressed in pigmented cells of the ciliary body
TTR is expressed in ciliary body epithelium
SOX2 is a core pluripotency transcription factor expressed in stem cells
KRT15 marks limbal stem cells in the corneal epithelium
TP63 is expressed in epithelial stem/progenitor cells including limbal stem cells
ABCG2 is an ABC transporter marking side population stem cells
ABCB5 marks limbal stem cells in the ocular surface
KRT14 is expressed in basal epithelial progenitor cells

RBPMS is a highly specific marker for retinal ganglion cells

POU4F2 (Brn3b) is a transcription factor essential for RGC development
Gamma-synuclein is highly expressed in retinal ganglion cells
SLC17A6 (VGLUT2) is a vesicular glutamate transporter expressed in RGCs
Neurofilament light chain is expressed in retinal ganglion cell axons
Neurofilament medium chain is expressed in retinal ganglion cells
GAP43 is expressed in retinal ganglion cells, particularly during axon growth
RPE65 is the retinoid isomerase essential for the visual cycle in RPE cells
Bestrophin 1 is a chloride channel specifically expressed in RPE cells
RLBP1 (CRALBP) is involved in the visual cycle and expressed in RPE
RDH5 is a retinol dehydrogenase in the visual cycle expressed in RPE

Tyrosinase is expressed in RPE for melanin synthesis

MITF is a transcription factor regulating RPE identity and melanogenesis
Transthyretin is secreted by RPE cells
Protein kinase C alpha is a classical marker of rod bipolar cells
PRKCA (PKCα) is the canonical rod bipolar cell marker
